title: Create Immersive Aircrafts
description: Retextures Immersive Aircrafts to work better with Create
body:
![Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0409a63f4f80171f7248a67f75e3d70531eca889.png)

### Download the [data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-immersive-aircrafts-recipes) if you want the corresponding recipes!



**You can use this pack and the datapack in modpacks, here and on [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack) etc. but please give me credit!**

---


**Version 3.0 is out! New textures for the Warship and Bamboo Hopper and a 1.21.1 release! Tested and working for Immersive Aircrafts 1.4.1 and Create 6.0.9**

---

There are 2 separate files to download:

- Resource Pack: Changes the textures (and some names in US language) of crafting items, upgrade items and vehicles of the Immersive Aircraft mod to look more like they belong in the Create Mod

- Data Pack: Changes Crafting recipes of every item to use items from Create to be more balanced with Create's progression (download located [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-immersive-aircrafts-recipes))

Make sure to install both the data pack and the resource pack correctly otherwise textures and recipes won't match properly

Obviously Requires Create and Immersive Aircrafts

---

Shout out to [crazyfl_](https://www.curseforge.com/members/crazyfl_/projects) and to [NewWorld](https://www.curseforge.com/members/newworld/projects) who were way more on the ball than I was with the Warship and Bamboo Hopper, creating there own addons for this pack. If you are looking for a slightly different style than the textures in 3.0, go check them out!

[Create Immersive Aircraft : Warship](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-warship)

[Create Immersive Aircraft : Bamboo Hopper](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircraft-bamboo-hopper)

---
